title: Synthesizer
body:
![synthesizer](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/xLvzypey/images/1fd2ab0f0b011d9196deb6d5c3b16af4e8c5cfc5.png)

A mod about rediscovering the most powerful block in Minecraft. Learn to manipulate sound waves and convert them into any item you want! Expands upon the new deep dark features, specifically echo shards.

Features:
- Synthesize any item in the game (including NBT)!
- Advancement tree to guide you through the mod and provide lore
- Extremely configurable (allow/deny items, configure how many items can be generated, and how often)

## Datapack

A datapack version of this mod is available. It does not include as many features or custom items/textures. For information about the datapack, please refer to the specific [Wiki](https://github.com/Sammcb/SynthesizerDatapack/wiki).
